vision: To be the production and knowledge-transfer hub driven by Thailand–Laos collaboration — elevating the dried-fruit industry to international standards and building a sustainable future for farmers and communities.
mission: To co-create a new standard for fruit processing through Thai–Lao CO-CREATION, raising the quality of produce and knowledge to grow sustainably together.

brand_dna.title: Sustainability
brand_dna.subtitle: Sustainable in economy, environment, and shared knowledge

brand_values.title: Integrity & Shared Responsibility
brand_values.description: Transparent, accountable, and respectful of every stakeholder.

brand_values.title: Innovation & Knowledge Transfer
brand_values.description: Modern processing technology paired with Thai–Lao knowledge transfer.

brand_values.title: Co-Creation for a Shared Future
brand_values.description: More than making products — building a shared economic future together.

about.summary: SUPAWAT GROUP SOLE (SG) was initiated by Prof. Dr. Ord Phongsavanh, Deputy Chairperson of the Lao Front for National Construction, who saw the opportunity to elevate Lao agricultural produce — abundant yet still sold as raw materials — by inviting a network of Thai experts, researchers, and designers to work hand-in-hand with Lao communities and partners to build international-grade processing standards.
about.detail: This project is not just an “OEM factory” but a learning hub, a technology transfer center, and an opportunity engine for the Lao people — powered by CO-CREATION among Thai academia, Lao enterprise, and farmers in the Lao Front for National Construction’s Samakkhi Village Fund network, who together design every step from raw material handling to international-standard production.
about.symbol: SG therefore stands as a symbol of shared effort, shared spirit, and shared wisdom between Thailand and Laos — where every stakeholder plays a role in making sustainability real.

services.title: Fruit Processing OEM
services.description: International-grade crispy fruit production and processing — from raw material sourcing to finished packaging.
bullets: Recipe & flavor customisation for client brands

services.title: Knowledge & Technology Transfer
services.description: Transferring technology and production know-how to Lao farmers and partners through the SG learning center.

services.title: Co-Creation Partnership
services.description: Designing projects together with communities, entrepreneurs, and researchers for lasting economic impact.

services.title: Brand & Packaging Design
services.description: Brand and packaging design that conveys community value while competing on the international stage.

services.title: Quality & Standard Consulting
services.description: Production-standard consulting to be ready for international audits and certification.

services.title: Sustainable Sourcing
services.description: Connecting farmers in the Samakkhi Village Fund network with markets that value sustainability.

highlights.title: Co-create Quality
